mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, category, duration_time, strt_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM habits WHERE 1=1 AND strt_date <= CURRENT_DATE AND end_date >= CURRENT_DATE AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, user_id, title, content, category, duration_time, strt_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM habits WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, user_id, title, content, category, duration_time, strt_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM habits WHERE category = #{category} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO habits( user_id, title, content, category, duration_time, strt_date, end_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{durationTime}, #{strtDate}, #{endDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE habits SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, duration_time = #{durationTime}, strt_date = #{strtDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, habit_id, completed_date, completed_at, category, duration_time, earned_exp, created_at, deleted_at FROM habit_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND habit_id = #{habitId} AND completed_date = #{completedDate} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO habit_logs ( user_id, habit_id, completed_date, category, duration_time, earned_exp ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{habitId}, #{completedDate}, #{category}, #{durationTime}, #{earnedExp} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.user_id, h.title, h.content, h.category, h.duration_time, h.strt_date, h.end_date, CASE WHEN hl.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS completed_today FROM habits h LEFT JOIN habit_logs hl ON h.id = hl.habit_id AND h.user_id = hl.user_id AND hl.completed_date = CURRENT_DATE AND hl.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE 1=1 AND h.strt_date <= CURRENT_DATE AND (h.end_date IS NULL OR h.end_date >= CURRENT_DATE) AND h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY h.created_at ASC
